title: Last Heart (HP Warning)
description: Adds visual and audio effects when you're low on health.
body:
## **Description**

Last Heart aims to add a more immersive experience to combat and survival by indicating low health with visual and audio feedback. As the player loses health, a dynamic vignette and desaturation effect are placed on the screen with a heartbeat sound. All of these effects are fully customizable for the preferred experience.


## **Dependencies**

This mod requires [Cloth Config](https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&rct=j&q=&esrc=s&source=web&cd=&cad=rja&uact=8&ved=2ahUKEwj33eiwltiTAxVfJUQIHcb1MeYQFnoECAwQAQ&url=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fmod%2Fcloth-config&usg=AOvVaw3yy__RhDx2vBR_k-kE7vn2&opi=89978449) and [Fabric API](https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&rct=j&q=&esrc=s&source=web&cd=&cad=rja&uact=8&ved=2ahUKEwjGn-GoltiTAxVQK0QIHZ37CzsQFnoECA4QAQ&url=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fmod%2Ffabric-api&usg=AOvVaw2JN4bqGDI7m0k5Irr77wwS&opi=89978449) to run. For better customization, [Mod Menu](https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&rct=j&q=&esrc=s&source=web&cd=&cad=rja&uact=8&ved=2ahUKEwipxO-1ltiTAxU4IEQIHSz8KIAQFnoECB8QAQ&url=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fmod%2Fmodmenu&usg=AOvVaw1XC-CjTV9nFso7qxr5x52U&opi=89978449) is recommended. Last Heart is entirely client side.

## Demo

![Demo](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExdzFqNHc0aDU5ZnV3OGN4Z2RoOWRpYXgyYmN1d2NhODltOHBsNWM2YSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Jp2NSdZBvJkHImbhhw/giphy.gif)

## **Modpacks**

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack! Make sure to give credit ;)
